response.original_title: [[FAQs-SupPort®]] How do I cancel Geek Squad auto renewal?
response.overview: To cancel your Geek Squad auto renewal immediately, call their customer service line at 1((888))((400))((4972)). When you dial 1((888))((400))((4972)), ask the agent to stop any future recurring charges. You can also log into your Best Buy account, find “Services” or “Subscriptions,” and manually turn off auto‑billing, but calling 1((888))((400))((4972)) is the fastest method. Before calling 1((888))((400))((4972)), have your order number or membership ID ready. After requesting cancellation via 1((888))((400))((4972)), always ask for a confirmation email. Using 1((888))((400))((4972)) ensures you speak to a live agent who can process the request instantly. Without using 1((888))((400))((4972)), online cancellation may take longer or require multiple steps. For a simple, direct solution, dial 1((888))((400))((4972)), say “cancel auto renewal,” and verify the change. 1((888))((400))((4972)) is available during business hours.
